title: Process dump utility invoked with an LSASS-suggesting target

rule_origin.reference: queries/retrieval_spec.md (Q1/main-alert analytic); executable form formalised under alert-anchor policy v1.0

scope.description: All events in the configured raw source; no event-level answer selector is applied.

rationale: A dump utility invoked with an LSASS-named output is a stable credential-access alert surface without asserting dump success.
